name: Conversation Memory
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for conversation with memory-augmented context, summarization, and entity extraction

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput, guaranteed latency for memory-heavy sessions

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Short-term session memory, conversation turns, user profiles, entity store

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Long-term semantic memory retrieval — vector search over conversation summaries and facts

prod.note: 50 indexes, 160GB, semantic ranker for memory relevance

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.purpose: Hot memory cache — recent conversation context, active user sessions, entity lookups

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Memory management API — tiered retrieval orchestration, summarization pipeline

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, encryption keys for memory at rest, session signing secrets

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Memory retrieval latency, cache hit rates, summarization quality metrics

services.name: Log Analytics
services.purpose: Centralized logging — memory tier operations, cache evictions, summarization runs

optimization_tips: Use Redis for last-5-turn context — avoids Cosmos DB reads for active sessions, sub-ms latency
Summarize conversations after 10 turns — reduces token usage for long sessions by 60-70%
Use GPT-4o-mini for summarization tasks, reserve GPT-4o for user-facing responses — saves 70%
Implement memory TTL policies — auto-archive memories older than 90 days to Cold storage
Use AI Search Basic tier for dev — saves $175/month vs Standard
Batch entity extraction during off-peak hours to reduce compute costs
